---
name: Course-run report
about: How a real course run went — the most valuable contribution to praxeum.
title: "[course-run] "
labels: ["course-run"]
---

<!-- The engine improves from real runs. Specifics beat vibes: "graded a correct refusal as a
     failure" tells us where to look; "the tutor was off" doesn't. Delete any prompt that
     doesn't apply. -->

**Course topic & module.**

<!-- e.g. "Learning Rust — module 03-ownership", or a whole phase. -->

**What the tutor did well.**

**What the tutor did badly.**

<!-- Prime-directive slips (wrote solution code?), hint escalation that leaked a spoiler,
     teach-before-task skipped, empty praise, a boss-check waved through. -->

**Materials bugs the QA ritual should have caught.**

<!-- Scaffold passed with the gaps still empty; hint-2 was pasteable; a check graded an
     implementation detail instead of behavior; a flaky timing assertion; a fixture that
     measured nothing. -->

**State desyncs.**

<!-- A session close that graded the quiz bank but never journaled / synced progress / committed;
     anything `npm run doctor` flagged. -->

**`npm run doctor` / `npm run validate` output (if relevant).**

```
paste here
```

**Anything else.**
